title: The End Is Nigh
description: The world is growing darker, deadlier, and more terrifying with each day... Can you survive the challenge?
body: The End Is Nigh is a survival challenge where the world grows darker, deadlier, and more terrifying with each passing day. Starting with eerie sounds and strange events, the player slowly descends into a nightmare filled with cursed mobs, world corruption, and psychological horror. By Day 100, survival becomes nearly impossible as the world itself turns against you.
